name: rails-best-practices
description: Import selected Campfire and Fizzy Rails best practices into a target Rails application.

interface.shortDescription: Choose and import Campfire and Fizzy Rails patterns.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for selecting overlapping or source-specific Rails best practices from Campfire and Fizzy, then importing the chosen patterns into a new or existing Rails application.
defaultPrompt: Use $rails-best-practices-importer to set up a new multi-tenant Rails app from the Fizzy playbook.
Use $rails-best-practices-importer to add a Campfire-style collaboration stack to this Rails app.
Use $rails-best-practices-importer to show the combined Campfire and Fizzy best-practices menu.
